variants.title: Donaldson P525185 Air Oil Separator | Replaces the Sakura SA-79938
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P525185 Air Oil Separator is designed to separate oil from compressed air systems, reducing oil carryover and improving air quality. It enhances system efficiency and protects downstream equipment. Built with durable materials, this separator ensures reliable operation in industrial and automotive applications.

variants.title: HiFi Filter OT 2836 Air/Oil Separator | Replaces the Sakura SA-79938
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter OT 2836 Air/Oil Separator is HiFi's replacement to the SAKURA SA-79938. Easy to install and replace, the OT 2836 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Fleetguard AS2201 Air Filter/Oil Separator | Replaces the Sakura SA-79938
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AS2201 air oil separator prevents oil build-up, protects against detonation, and minimizes oil loss which equates to reduced maintenance and more consistent performance.
